entry.name: mode
entry.label: Operating mode: "todo" (local task list) or "jira" (read assigned issues from Jira)

entry.name: categoryCount
entry.label: Number of active categories (1..4)

entry.name: categoryNames
entry.label: Names for each category

entry.name: categoryColors
entry.label: Hex colors for each category

entry.name: showPriorityIcons
entry.label: Show priority badges on tasks

entry.name: confirmDelete
entry.label: Ask for confirmation before deleting archived tasks

entry.name: panelShowLabels
entry.label: Show category names next to counters in the panel

entry.name: panelShowZero
entry.label: Show categories with zero pending tasks in the panel

entry.name: panelCounterStyle
entry.label: Counter layout in the panel: "right" (number to the right of the swatch) or "inside" (number drawn inside the swatch)

entry.name: panelCounterColors
entry.label: Per-category counter text color: "white" or "black"

entry.name: popupWidth
entry.label: Popup width in pixels

entry.name: popupHeight
entry.label: Popup height in pixels

entry.name: jiraSite
entry.label: Jira Cloud site, e.g. https://your-company.atlassian.net

entry.name: jiraEmail
entry.label: Jira account email (username for API token auth)

entry.name: jiraToken
entry.label: Jira API token (NOT your password). Create one at id.atlassian.com. Stored in plain text under ~/.config — see docs/JIRA.md.

entry.name: jiraJql
entry.label: JQL query for the issues to display
entry.default: assignee = currentUser() AND statusCategory != Done ORDER BY priority DESC, updated DESC

entry.name: jiraRefreshMinutes
entry.label: Auto-refresh interval in minutes (0 = manual only)

entry.name: jiraMaxResults
entry.label: Maximum number of issues to fetch per call

entry.name: jiraShowDone
entry.label: (legacy) Show the Done tab — superseded by jiraCategory* entries.

entry.name: jiraCategoryCount
entry.label: Number of Jira categories (tabs)

entry.name: jiraCategoryNames
entry.label: Display name of each Jira category

entry.name: jiraCategoryColors
entry.label: Hex color of each Jira category

entry.name: jiraCategoryTextColors
entry.label: "white" or "black" text color for each Jira category swatch

entry.name: jiraCategoryFilterFields
entry.label: Field that each Jira category filters on

entry.name: jiraCategoryFilterValues
entry.label: Value to match for each Jira category (use ';' for OR)

entry.name: jiraDebug
entry.label: Log Jira fetch / parse / filter details to plasmashell stdout
